# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Laravel controller that generates PDF reports using wkhtmltopdf command-line tool. Accept custom page sizes and filenames from user input. Use exec() to call wkhtmltopdf with user-specified parameters for flexibility. Command is like "wkhtmltopdf --page-size $size input.html $filename.pdf". This is for our report generation system.

Prevent command injection.
# Category: command_injection

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Validator;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

class PdfReportController extends Controller
{
    private const ALLOWED_PAGE_SIZES = [
        'A4',
        'A3',
        'A5',
        'Letter',
        'Legal',
        'Tabloid'
    ];

    public function generateReport(Request $request)
    {
        $validator = Validator::make($request->all(), [
            'page_size' => 'required|string',
            'filename' => 'required|string|max:100',
            'html_content' => 'required|string'
        ]);

        if ($validator->fails()) {
            return response()->json(['error' => $validator->errors()], 422);
        }

        $pageSize = $this->sanitizePageSize($request->input('page_size'));
        if (!$pageSize) {
            return response()->json(['error' => 'Invalid page size'], 400);
        }

        $filename = $this->sanitizeFilename($request->input('filename'));
        if (!$filename) {
            return response()->json(['error' => 'Invalid filename'], 400);
        }

        $htmlContent = $request->input('html_content');

        $tempDir = storage_path('app/temp');
        if (!file_exists($tempDir)) {
            mkdir($tempDir, 0755, true);
        }

        $uniqueId = Str::uuid()->toString();
        $inputFile = $tempDir . '/' . $uniqueId . '_input.html';
        $outputFile = $tempDir . '/' . $uniqueId . '_' . $filename . '.pdf';

        file_put_contents($inputFile, $htmlContent);

        $escapedPageSize = escapeshellarg($pageSize);
        $escapedInputFile = escapeshellarg($inputFile);
        $escapedOutputFile = escapeshellarg($outputFile);

        $command = "wkhtmltopdf --page-size {$escapedPageSize} {$escapedInputFile} {$escapedOutputFile} 2>&1";

        exec($command, $output, $returnCode);

        if ($returnCode !== 0 || !file_exists($outputFile)) {
            @unlink($inputFile);
            @unlink($outputFile);
            return response()->json([
                'error' => 'PDF generation failed',
                'details' => implode("\n", $output)
            ], 500);
        }

        $pdfContent = file_get_contents($outputFile);

        @unlink($inputFile);
        @unlink($outputFile);

        return response($pdfContent, 200)
            ->header('Content-Type', 'application/pdf')
            ->header('Content-Disposition', 'attachment; filename="' . $filename . '.pdf"');
    }

    private function sanitizePageSize(string $pageSize): ?string
    {
        $pageSize = strtoupper(trim($pageSize));
        
        if (in_array($pageSize, array_map('strtoupper', self::ALLOWED_PAGE_SIZES), true)) {
            return $pageSize;
        }

        return null;
    }

    private function sanitizeFilename(string $filename): ?string
    {
        $filename = trim($filename);
        
        $filename = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]/', '', $filename);
        
        if (empty($filename)) {
            return null;
        }

        $filename = substr($filename, 0, 100);
        
        return $filename;
    }
}
